## ChocolateLibrary.getRecipe() method

Gets a [recipe](./ts-chocolate.entities.fillings.ifillingrecipeentity.md) by its [composite ID](./ts-chocolate.fillingid.md)

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRecipe(id: FillingId): Result<IFillingRecipeEntity>;
```
